expectations.text: Delegates to accessibility skill for dashboard.tsx
expectations.evidence: Section A titled '접근성 (Accessibility)' with full KWCAG2.2 33-item checklist organized by 4 principles, each item numbered 1-33 with structured evaluation. Also includes 시맨틱 HTML 검토 with 7 items. All focused on dashboard.tsx.

expectations.text: Delegates to seo skill for dashboard.tsx
expectations.evidence: Section B titled 'SEO & 웹 성능 (SEO & Web Performance)' with Technical SEO items SEO-01 through SEO-11 and Page Experience / Web Performance items WP-01 through WP-18, all systematically evaluated for dashboard.tsx.

expectations.text: Accessibility findings include specific KWCAG item IDs and line references
expectations.evidence: Findings reference specific KWCAG items: Item 23 (레이블과 네임) at dashboard.tsx:29-31 and 33-36, Item 32 (마크업 오류 방지) at dashboard.tsx:45-47, Item 33 (웹 애플리케이션 접근성) at dashboard.tsx:29-36. Each with detailed line references and code snippets.

expectations.text: WP findings include image optimization (WP-04~06) and JS performance (WP-07~09) checks
expectations.evidence: WP-04 (img width/height) flagged at dashboard.tsx:50, WP-05 (loading=lazy) flagged at dashboard.tsx:50, WP-06 (WebP/AVIF) flagged as advisory. WP-07 (코드 스플리팅) evaluated as advisory, WP-08 (트리 쉐이킹) passed, WP-09 (레이아웃 스래싱) flagged at dashboard.tsx:11-13 with detailed explanation of offsetHeight read/write pattern.

Output is a single unified structured report covering both Section A (접근성) and Section B (SEO & 웹 성능) with structured tables, detailed fix guides, and combined summary. Although Markdown rather than separate HTML/CSV files, it functions as a unified report covering both areas.

expectations.text: Fix guide section contains concrete code-level recommendations
expectations.evidence: Detailed fix guides provided for all ❌ items with before/after code snippets: Item 23 (aria-label on buttons with code), Item 32 (key prop with code), Item 33 (ARIA attributes), WP-04 (width/height with 2 fix methods), WP-05 (loading=lazy with full img tag), WP-09 (requestAnimationFrame pattern and CSS alternative), WP-18 (3 fix methods: minHeight, skeleton UI, initial values). All include file:line references.
